{"cards": [{"name": "Skybound Inquisitor", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}{U}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W", "U"], "color_identity": ["W", "U"], "type_line": "Creature — Human Wizard", "oracle_text": "Flying
When ~ enters, scry 2.
Whenever ~ deals combat damage to a player, you may exile target nonland permanent until ~ leaves the battlefield.", "flavor_text": ""Knowledge and justice are both tools of order."", "power": "2", "toughness": "3", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Azorius signpost combining white's exile-based removal with blue's scrying and evasion. Flying enables combat damage trigger, scry provides card selection, and temporary exile is classic Azorius tempo control. Stats are efficient enough for aggressive decks but abilities reward controlling play."}, {"name": "Bloodpyre Ravager", "mana_cost": "{2}{B}{R}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["B", "R"], "color_identity": ["B", "R"], "type_line": "Creature — Demon Warrior", "oracle_text": "Haste
When ~ enters, you may sacrifice a creature. If you do, ~ deals 3 damage to any target and you draw a card.
{1}{B}{R}: ~ gets +2/+0 until end of turn and deals 1 damage to you.", "flavor_text": "Pain is the currency of power.", "power": "3", "toughness": "4", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Rakdos build-around that converts creatures into damage and cards, embodying black's sacrifice-for-value and red's aggressive damage. The activated ability offers repeatable aggression at the cost of life, creating interesting risk/reward decisions. Haste enables immediate pressure."}, {"name": "Traveler's Compass", "mana_cost": "{2}", "cmc": 2, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Artifact — Equipment", "oracle_text": "When ~ enters, search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
Equipped creature gets +1/+1.
Equip {1}", "flavor_text": "Every journey begins with a single step in the right direction.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple equipment that provides mana fixing and modest creature enhancement. The land search is colorless ramp/fixing that any deck can use. Equipment template follows standard format with modest +1/+1 bonus and cheap equip cost appropriate for common."}, {"name": "Nexus Engine", "mana_cost": "{4}", "cmc": 4, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Artifact", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {C}{C}.
{2}, {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card.
{5}, {T}, Sacrifice ~: Search your library for an artifact card with mana value 3 or less, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Complex artifact with three distinct activated abilities showcasing proper tap/cost syntax. Mana acceleration, card selection, and artifact tutoring create multiple strategic uses. Each ability has escalating costs reflecting increasing power level. Sacrifice cost on final ability prevents repetitive use."}, {"name": "Seraph of Sacred Shadows", "mana_cost": "{2}{W}{B}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["W", "B"], "color_identity": ["W", "B"], "type_line": "Legendary Planeswalker — Kira", "oracle_text": "+1: You gain 2 life and each opponent loses 1 life.
-2: Exile target creature. Its controller gains life equal to its power.
-7: You get an emblem with "Whenever a creature dies, you may return it to the battlefield under your control with a +1/+1 counter on it."", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": "4", "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "Orzhov planeswalker embodying life manipulation and creature control. Plus ability provides incremental advantage, minus ability is premium removal with white's life compensation, ultimate creates a powerful recursive engine. Starting loyalty of 4 allows immediate minus ability use while requiring protection for ultimate."}]}
